description: Callee contains internal SQL sink (db.query inside processAndStore). Tests callee-internal sink detection during interprocedural execution.

expected.notes: outer call site: req.query.msg → processAndStore where summary param_to_sink resolves the SQL_QUERY cap via outer_callee fallback (CVE-2025-64430-style detection)
callee-internal flow: tainted input param reaches client.query inside processAndStore during interprocedural execution
return-value flow: processAndStore returns input.length, count carries taint to res.json (HTML_ESCAPE sink)
